reason_full_test_not_run: No opentry_8 structural checkpoint with validation generation metrics exceeding opentry_7 pure model or approaching CrystaLLM-a GT-SG was trained in this run. Running official full test would violate the prompt gate.

opentry_7_pure_control.diagnosis: Not a structural W/A+geometry model and clearly below CrystaLLM-a GT-SG.

MiniCFJoint_v2_validation.diagnosis: Action space and exact-cover feasibility are viable, but deterministic geometry did not pass validation gate.

SymCIF_v5_evidence.model_type: structured retrieval/index plus exact-cover W/A and geometry
SymCIF_v5_evidence.diagnosis: Strong strategy evidence that W/A coverage is the main bottleneck, but not eligible as pure structural model.

required_next_checkpoint_gate.minimum_to_run_official_full_test: Validation must clearly beat opentry_7 pure_crystallm_gt_sg or approach CrystaLLM-a GT-SG under strict fixed candidate order.

recommended_model.wa_decoder: skeleton-first or autoregressive row decoder with exact-cover feasibility and remaining-composition masks
recommended_model.geometry: multimodal lattice/free-parameter head with wrapped coordinate loss and short-contact/collision loss
recommended_model.checkpoint_selection: validation generation metrics, not token loss
recommended_model.candidate_order: candidate 0 deterministic decode; candidates 1-19 fixed-seed sampling; no reordering by score, validity, logprob, energy, RMSE, or StructureMatcher
